allow: Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./app.json'\); console.log\('Compatibility:', j.compatibility\); console.log\('Driver capabilities:', j.drivers[0].capabilities\); console.log\('Has target_power:', j.drivers[0].capabilities.includes\('target_power'\)\); console.log\('Has target_power_mode:', j.drivers[0].capabilities.includes\('target_power_mode'\)\); console.log\('Has measure_dynamic:', j.drivers[0].capabilities.includes\('measure_dynamic'\)\); console.log\('capabilitiesOptions:', JSON.stringify\(j.drivers[0].capabilitiesOptions?.target_power, null, 2\)\); console.log\('phase_mode setting:', j.drivers[0].settings?.find\(s => s.id === 'phase_mode'\)?.id\);")

Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./app.json'\); console.log\('target_power_mode values count:', j.drivers[0].capabilitiesOptions?.target_power_mode?.values?.length\); console.log\('target_power_mode values:', j.drivers[0].capabilitiesOptions?.target_power_mode?.values?.map\(v => v.id\)\);")
